summary: Comprehensive testing of the new Export Student Data feature. All 20 backend tests passed covering JSON export, HTML export, authentication, and authorization. Frontend UI tests confirmed both Export JSON and Print Report buttons are visible and functional.

issues: Recharts console warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - charts still render correctly but may have momentary rendering delay (same as iteration 2)

seed_data_creation: Some TEST_ prefixed guardians and students created during auth testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export Student Data feature fully tested. GET /api/students/{id}/export?format=json returns JSON with Content-Disposition header for file download. GET /api/students/{id}/export?format=html returns styled HTML report with print button. Frontend Export JSON and Print Report buttons visible in Progress Detail view.

backend_api_tests: Export requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Export rejects unauthorized guardian (returns 403)
JSON export returns 200 status code
JSON export includes Content-Disposition header for file download
JSON export returns application/json content type
JSON export includes report_date field
JSON export includes exported_by field
JSON export includes all sections (report_date, exported_by, student, reading_stats, vocabulary, assessments, narratives, assigned_banks)
JSON export student profile contains id, full_name, biological_target
HTML export returns 200 status code
HTML export returns text/html content type
HTML export is valid HTML document (DOCTYPE, html, head, body tags)
HTML export contains student name
HTML export contains stats-grid with stat-box elements
HTML export contains Assessment History table
HTML export contains Story History table
HTML export contains Print / Save as PDF button with window.print()
HTML export contains @media print styles
Export returns 404 for nonexistent student
Export defaults to JSON format when no format param specified
frontend_ui_tests: Export JSON button visible on Progress Detail view (data-testid='export-json-btn')
Print Report button visible on Progress Detail view (data-testid='export-html-btn')
Export JSON button triggers fetch + blob download
Print Report button opens HTML report in new window
HTML report in new window contains correct content (LexiMaster Progress Report title)

components_verified: Frontend fetch + blob download for JSON
